---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to tab '...'
2. Click '...'
3. Paste '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14.5 Intel, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Python version:** (run `python3 --version`)
- **GPG version:** (run `gpg --version`)
- **App version:** (e.g. v2.0.1 — check the Releases page)
- **How you're running it:** (downloaded .dmg / .exe / .AppImage, or running python3 directly)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Additional Context
Anything else relevant — e.g. does it happen with all keys or just one,
does it happen with both PGP key and passphrase modes, etc.
